steps.title: Check current trickster deployment
steps.description:
Verify your trickster version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n trickster -l app.kubernetes.io/name=trickster
helm list -n trickster 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working trickster installation.

steps.title: Review trickster configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant trickster configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n trickster -l app.kubernetes.io/name=trickster
kubectl get configmap -n trickster -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=trickster
```
Hi,

I installed v0.1.3 in order to see if it fixes https://github.com/Comcast/trickster/issues/92 but I encountered this.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Panic with v0.1.3
steps.description:
The cause of #105 was that trickster's crop method wasn't handling a SampleStream with no points. I have fixed the crop function to handle this properly and added a set of tests for the cropToRange method to ensure we don't regress.
```yaml
panic: runtime error: index out of range
goroutine 493 [running]:
main.(*PrometheusMatrixEnvelope).cropToRange(0xc0001c06f8, 0x5c06535c, 0x0)
	/go/src/github.com/Comcast/trickster/handlers.go:1014 +0x4ee
main.(*TricksterHandler).originRangeProxyHandler(0xc000062140, 0xc000312640, 0x41, 0xc00014c8a0)
	/go/src/github.com/Comcast/trickster/handlers.go:840 +0x615
created by main.(*TricksterHandler).queueRangeProxyRequest
	/go/src/github.com/Comcast/trickster/handlers.go:660 +0x276
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n trickster -l app.kubernetes.io/name=trickster
kubectl get events -n trickster --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Panic with v0.1.3" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: The cause of #105 was that trickster's crop method wasn't handling a SampleStream with no points. I have fixed the crop function to handle this properly and added a set of tests for the cropToRange method to ensure we don't regress.
codeSnippets:
panic: runtime error: index out of range
goroutine 493 [running]:
main.(*PrometheusMatrixEnvelope).cropToRange(0xc0001c06f8, 0x5c06535c, 0x0)
	/go/src/github.com/Comcast/trickster/handlers.go:1014 +0x4ee
main.(*TricksterHandler).originRangeProxyHandler(0xc000062140, 0xc000312640, 0x41, 0xc00014c8a0)
	/go/src/github.com/Comcast/trickster/handlers.go:840 +0x615
created by main.(*TricksterHandler).queueRangeProxyRequest
	/go/src/github.com/Comcast/trickster/handlers.go:660 +0x276

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with trickster installed or the issue environment reproducible.
